evals.prompt: 请帮我深度研究 badlogic/pi-mono 这个项目，重点分析它如何实现 agent 反应循环和上下文压缩，加上源码引用和代码片段
evals.expected_output: Generates a complete research document with source file references for each feature, includes key code snippets, searches and filters technical articles from CSDN/juejin, outputs properly formatted markdown

evals.prompt: 对比研究一下 anomalyco/opencode 和 badlogic/pi-mono 两个项目对子代理创建的实现有什么不同，整理成markdown文档
evals.expected_output: Generates two research documents, compares the architectural differences between the two projects, both with proper source references, organized in clean directory structure

evals.prompt: 研究四个领先的 AI coding agent 项目（pi-mono, OpenCode, Codex CLI, Claude Code）在六个核心特性（Agent React, 上下文压缩, SubAgent, Skill机制, 会话隔离, Agent Teams）上的实现差异，整理好后发布到GitHub
evals.expected_output: Complete systematic research with four detailed documents in agents/ directory, README with comparison table, creates GitHub repository and pushes all content
